title: Standard Library Problem Solving
description: Add time, statistics, secure identifiers, text search, process, and logging features to the data tool. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a standard-library operations toolkit while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Select standard-library modules from task contracts rather than memorized recipes.
Handle time zones, randomness, processes, and text patterns safely.
Keep external effects injectable and testable.
